description: The CloudServerStatus component gets live data about the Resonite cloud by getting the ping data the game engine is sending and receiving from the cloud.

fields.ResponseTimeMilliseconds: How long in milliseconds it took for the server to respond to the last ping.
fields.LastServerUpdateTime: The last time the server updated
fields.LastServerStateFetch: The last time the server status was fetched.
fields.LastLocalServerResponseTime: The last time the client got a response from the server.
